case_title: DIANE J. SHASKY et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHASKY, DIANE J. SHASKY, JOSEPH P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHASKY, DIANE J. SHASKY, JOSEPH P. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHASKY, DIANE J. SHASKY, JOSEPH P. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION FROM BANK OF AMERICA RE CHANGE OF ADDRESS TO A MAILING ADDRESS FOR ALL CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
